Tests the conversion of a floating-point number to a string in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of JavaScript's `String` function when converting a floating-point number to a string. It verifies that the number `0.111111111111111` is accurately converted to the string `"0.111111111111111"`. This test ensures that the conversion process maintains the precision of the floating-point number in its string representation. The code is a single assertion and does not provide broad functionality, serving instead as a specific test case for string conversion accuracy.
